title: pogonatherum crinitum
intro: Pogonatherum crinitum, also known as the bearded button-grass or hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pogonatherum crinitum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Pogonatherum crinitum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a decoction or powder for various herbal remedies.
